chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-167 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 14.04.2023. Mr. Badal Gahoti advocate for the applicants. Mr. Abdul Waheed Bijarani Assistant Prosecutor General. Applicants are present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- The allegations against the applicants are of hunting and slaughtering a deer in a forest situated near village Sinehri Khohi, Taluka Diplo on 20.01.2023 in night hours. Learned counsel for the applicants submits that all the offences are bailable and there is no direct evidence against the applicants of hunting a deer and slaughtering it except hearsay. Learned APG has admitted that all the offences with which the applicants are booked are bailable, therefore, he has no objection on grant of this bail application as in bailable offences custody of accused is not required if they are ready to furnish surety. Applicants have been booked in offences u/s 9(i)-A, 21 of Sindh Wildlife Protection, Preservation, Conservation and Management Act, 2020 which are bailable. As per the statement of learned Assistant PG custody of the applicants is not required as they have already furnished surety. In the circumstances, the bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants vide order dated 20.02.2023 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
